title: A pair of shoes I repaired
summary: Tell the story of an old pair of shoes you decided to repair instead of throw away.
topic: A pair of shoes I repaired
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about a pair of shoes you repaired. Describe the shoes, why you kept them, and how the cobbler fixed them. Use past simple and present simple.
hintStarters: I have a pair of brown shoes that…
Last year, the sole was broken, so…
I took them to a shoe repair shop because…
sampleText: I have a pair of brown leather shoes. I bought them seven years ago. They are very comfortable and they fit my feet well. Last year, the sole on the right shoe was broken, and the lace was very old. I almost threw the shoes away, but I changed my mind. I took them to a cobbler near my flat. The cobbler is a quiet man with strong hands. He looked at the shoes and he said the work was small. He used new glue on the sole, fixed the heel, and put in two new laces. The next day, he also polished the leather. The shoes were ready in three days. The price was very small, much less than new shoes. Now the shoes look almost new. I wear them every week to work. I am happy I did not throw them away. Good shoes can last for many years if you take care of them.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Past simple in a story
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Kể chuyện đã xảy ra dùng quá khứ đơn: 'I bought', 'I took', 'He looked', 'He used', 'He polished'. Trộn cả động từ thường (looked, used) và bất quy tắc (bought, took).
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Tell finished stories in the past simple: 'I bought', 'I took', 'He looked', 'He used', 'He polished'. Mix regular (looked, used) and irregular verbs (bought, took).

sampleGrammarNotes.title: First conditional with 'if'
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Câu điều kiện đơn giản: 'if' + hiện tại đơn, kết quả ở hiện tại hoặc 'can'. 'Good shoes can last for many years if you take care of them'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Simple conditional: 'if' + present simple, result in present or with 'can'. 'Good shoes can last for many years if you take care of them'.

sampleTranslationVi: Tôi có một đôi giày da nâu. Tôi mua chúng bảy năm trước. Chúng rất thoải mái và vừa chân. Năm ngoái, đế giày bên phải bị hỏng, và dây giày đã rất cũ. Tôi suýt vứt đôi giày đi, nhưng tôi đã đổi ý. Tôi mang chúng đến một người thợ sửa giày gần căn hộ. Người thợ là một người đàn ông trầm tính với đôi tay mạnh mẽ. Ông nhìn đôi giày và nói công việc nhỏ thôi. Ông dùng keo mới cho đế, sửa gót và xỏ hai sợi dây giày mới. Hôm sau, ông cũng đánh bóng phần da. Đôi giày xong trong ba ngày. Giá rất rẻ, ít hơn nhiều so với giày mới. Bây giờ đôi giày trông gần như mới. Tôi mang chúng đi làm mỗi tuần. Tôi vui vì đã không vứt chúng đi. Giày tốt có thể dùng được nhiều năm nếu bạn chăm sóc chúng.

mcQuestions.prompt: When did the writer buy the shoes?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I bought them seven years ago'.

options: The sole on the right shoe
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'the sole on the right shoe was broken'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find what was broken in the past sentence.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why did the writer keep the shoes?
options: They were comfortable and fit well
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'They are very comfortable and they fit my feet well'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What is the past simple of 'take'?
What did the cobbler do for the shoes?
options: He used new glue, fixed the heel, and put in two new laces
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'He used new glue on the sole, fixed the heel, and put in two new laces'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the list of tasks the cobbler did.

mcQuestions.prompt: How many days did the repair take?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The shoes were ready in three days'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence uses past simple correctly?
options: I almost throwed the shoes away.
I almost threw the shoes away.
I almost thrown the shoes away.
I almost throw the shoes away.

mcQuestions.prompt: How does the writer wear the shoes now?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I wear them every week to work'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find how often the writer wears them now.

options: Good shoes can last for many years if you take care of them.
Good shoes can last for many years if you took care of them.
Good shoes can last for many years if you will take care of them.
Good shoes can lasted for many years if you take care of them.
mcQuestions.explanation: First conditional: 'if' + present simple, then 'can' + base verb.
mcQuestions.hint: After 'if' in a present rule, use present simple.

mcQuestions.prompt: How does the writer feel about the decision?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I am happy I did not throw them away'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the feeling word about the decision.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do many people today buy new shoes instead of repairing old ones? What is lost when we choose buying over fixing?
